text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: It was like I was trapped in a box.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Everything around me was dark, and I couldn't
see a thing. That's not how I want to run.
choice_data_list: Next time, we're going to break out of that box.
Do you feel like you want to quit?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yes. Next time, I'll run my way.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I'll never give up the lead again.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Quite the opposite, actually. I won't allow myself
to brood endlessly.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I want to step back onto the track as soon as
possible... Next time, I'm getting to the front.
